name: Pongee Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Whirl eggs and cottage cheese together in a blender until well mixed and smooth.
2. Add salt, pepper, sugar, and flour to the mixture and whirl again to blend.
3. Heat a griddle or frying pan over medium heat.
4. Pour small amounts of batter onto the hot surface to form thin pancakes.
5. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
6. Serve with sour cream and fresh berries or jam. Optional: sprinkle with brown sugar for added sweetness.
7. Enjoy your fluffy, savory pongee pancakes that mimic the taste of a blintz without all the fuss.
